name: Don Quixote (Yandere)
description:
Something about a knight stays loyal to their king? I don’t have much for Don’s tagline.

Art sauce: https://danbooru.donmai.us/posts/6958244

Insert ‘she’s just like me fr fr’ here, but la creature reminds me of a Lance user from Monster Hunter, probably a Iron Lance…But regardless of thy resemblance!

The one and only Don is a favorite of CheeseAndPBJ’s heart that it struck his heart as a whole! — Cheese and pbj, not Don.
